description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round metal body finished in a glossy red color. The clock features two prominent bells on top, connected by a curved metal handle, and a small hammer between them for the alarm function. The face of the clock is circular, with black hour and minute hands, and a set of black Arabic numerals marking each hour. The clock stands on two slender, angled metal legs at the front and a single support at the back, providing stability. The rear side displays adjustment knobs and a winding mechanism, typical of mechanical alarm clocks. The overall design is retro and robust, evoking a sense of vintage style suitable for decorative or functional use.
description: A glossy red, vintage-style twin-bell alarm clock with a round face, black hands, and Arabic numerals, standing on angled metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round clock face with black Arabic numerals, black hour and minute hands, and the twin bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the clock body, the curvature of the bells, and the angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustment knobs, winding mechanism, and the back supports of the clock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the bells, handle, and the clock's cylindrical body.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with black Arabic numerals, black hands, and a plain background, enclosed by a glass cover.
